home.eyebrow: Websites for businesses in the Palatinate
home.headline: Websites with a clear profile for holiday rentals, restaurants, and local businesses.
home.subheadline: I build modern websites that look professional, are easy to understand, and bring in new inquiries.

trust.title: What clients get from working with me
items: Personal collaboration instead of agency talk
A clear regional focus on the Palatinate
Practical understanding of hospitality and local trades
Hosting, maintenance, and further development from one source

items.title: Professional website creation
items.description: From the first structure to launch, you get a website that fits your business.

items.title: Hosting and technical support
items.description: I take care of the technical side so your website stays stable and available.

items.title: Maintenance and ongoing updates
items.description: When your content, offers, or opening hours change, your website stays up to date.

audiences.title: Who I build websites for
items: Local service providers and smaller companies

whyMe.title: Why this is a good fit
items: I do not just speak tech. I also understand day-to-day business workflows.
I value clear communication instead of agency language.
I build websites so visitors quickly understand what matters.
I work regionally and close to the real needs of smaller businesses.

packages.title: Packages for typical projects
packages.note: It is important to me that smaller businesses can also achieve a professional online presence. That is why I deliberately start with an affordable entry point from EUR 1,090 that can be expanded flexibly when needed.
packages.supportNote: In the minimal package, hosting is mandatory and included (from EUR 9 per month). In all other packages, hosting can be added from EUR 9 per month. Maintenance and updates from EUR 109 per month.

items.name: Compact
items.description: From EUR 1,690. For smaller businesses that want to broaden their content and present themselves with a clear, coherent overall presence.

items.name: Host
items.description: From EUR 2,790. For holiday rentals and hosts who want to build trust and generate direct inquiries.

items.name: Custom
items.description: From EUR 4,290. For businesses with specific needs, more content, or extended functionality.

items.question: Is this suitable for smaller businesses as well?
items.answer: Yes. Smaller businesses especially benefit from a clear and professional online presence.

items.question: Can I also get hosting and maintenance?
items.answer: Yes. Website creation, hosting, and ongoing maintenance can all be handled together in one setup. In the minimal package, hosting is mandatory and included (from EUR 9 per month). In all other packages, hosting can be added from EUR 9 per month. Maintenance and updates from EUR 109 per month.

items.question: Is an English version possible too?
items.answer: Yes. The website is planned for both German and English from the start.

contact.title: Let us talk about your project
contact.description: If you need a website for your business in the Palatinate, get in touch easily via the form or by email.
contact.regionNote: For businesses, hosts, and local companies in the Palatinate and nearby.

form.title: Send a direct inquiry
form.description: Send me a few details about your project and I will get back to you.
form.privacyNote: By submitting, your inquiry is sent to me for processing.

status.error: Your inquiry could not be sent right now.

legal.footerNote: Pfalz Development, web development for businesses in the Palatinate.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.providerTitle: Provider information pursuant to § 5 DDG (formerly § 5 TMG)
imprint.responsibleTitle: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18 para. 2 MStV
imprint.noticeText: The content of this website is created with great care and updated regularly. If any content or links violate applicable law, please provide a corresponding notice.
imprint.vatIdText: No VAT identification number exists pursuant to § 27a German VAT Act (UStG).
imprint.disputeResolutionText: I am neither obliged nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
imprint.liabilityContentText: I am responsible for my own content on these pages under general law. However, no warranty is assumed for the constant accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information provided. If legal violations become known, the affected content will be removed without delay.
imprint.liabilityLinksText: My website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content I have no control. Therefore, I cannot assume any liability for this external content. The respective provider or operator is always responsible for the linked pages. Upon becoming aware of legal violations, I will remove such links immediately.
imprint.copyrightText: The content and works created by the site operator on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, editing, distribution and any type of use beyond the limits of copyright law require the written consent of the respective author or creator.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overviewText: This website processes personal data only to the extent required for operating the website and handling inquiries.
privacy.dataTypesText: Depending on your use of this website, the processed data may include inventory data, contact data, content data, usage data, connection data, and meta/log data (e.g. technical access data).
privacy.purposesText: Data is processed to provide and technically operate the website, handle contact requests, prevent misuse, and perform statistical reach measurement for QR campaigns based on pseudonymized data. Drawing conclusions about individual persons is currently neither intended nor pursued.
privacy.legalBasisText: Contact requests are processed based on Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b GDPR (pre-contractual communication) and Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR (efficient request handling). Technical security/log data and pseudonymized QR statistics are processed based on Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR. Even when pseudonymized, QR processing remains subject to data protection law.
privacy.contactRequestsText: If you contact me via the contact form or by email, the submitted information (name, email, optional business/phone, message) will be processed to handle your request and stored for follow-up.
privacy.serverLogsText: When visiting the website, technically necessary server logs may be processed. For contact requests, the IP address is logged only in pseudonymized form (short hash) for security and abuse prevention.
privacy.cookiesText: This website does not use analytics or marketing cookies and does not set consent-requiring cookies. Only technically necessary cookies and comparable technologies are used where required for secure operation. Tracking via external analytics platforms (e.g. Google Analytics) is currently not used.
privacy.recipientsText: Data is shared with third parties only where necessary for contractual performance, technical service provision (e.g. hosting, email delivery), or legal obligations. For reach measurement via QR links, pseudonymized access data is processed.
privacy.processorsText: Hosting is provided by STRATO AG, Otto-Ostrowski-Straße 7, 10249 Berlin, Germany. A data processing agreement pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR is in place with the hosting provider. Email delivery is handled by a technically integrated email service provider (SMTP provider) as part of technical communication.
privacy.storageText: Contact inquiries are generally stored in email inboxes for up to 12 months unless statutory retention obligations require longer storage. Pseudonymized QR tracking data is automatically deleted after 90 days.
privacy.securityText: Appropriate technical and organizational measures are implemented to protect your data against loss, unauthorized access, and other risks. This website uses SSL/TLS encryption for data transmission.
privacy.rightsText: Under applicable law, you have in particular the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection to certain processing activities.
privacy.revocationText: You may withdraw any consent you have given at any time with effect for the future. The lawfulness of processing carried out before withdrawal remains unaffected.
privacy.complaintText: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority regarding the processing of your personal data.
privacy.dpoText: There is currently no legal obligation to appoint a data protection officer.
